description_long: This electric fan features a rectangular, box-like housing with a prominent circular fan blade assembly visible through a sturdy front grille. The grille consists of radial and concentric bars, providing both protection and airflow. The fan blades are broad and slightly curved, designed for efficient air movement. On the top edge of the housing, there are two distinct buttons or switches, one red and one gray, likely for power and speed control. The casing appears to be made of matte black plastic, giving it a modern, utilitarian look suitable for urban environments. The overall design is compact and functional, with no visible power cord.
description: A compact, box-shaped electric fan with a black plastic housing, visible circular blade assembly, and a protective grille. It features two control buttons on the top and a modern, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the circular fan blades behind a radial grille, with two control buttons visible on the top edge.
description_view_1: This angled side view highlights the depth of the housing and the side profile of the grille, with the red button more prominent.
description_view_2: The opposite front view again shows the fan blades and grille, with the control buttons on the top left corner.
description_view_3: This rear-angled view emphasizes the boxy shape and the top-mounted control buttons, with less visibility of the fan blades.
attribute_blade_guard_design: The blade guard is a rigid grille with radial and concentric bars, made of metal or reinforced plastic, providing robust protection and airflow.
